modules.title: Python Fundamentals
modules.description: Core Python programming: data types, control flow, functions, OOP, and standard library essentials.

modules.title: Advanced Python & Design Patterns
modules.description: Decorators, generators, metaclasses, concurrency, and enterprise design patterns in Python.

modules.title: JavaScript Essentials
modules.description: Modern JavaScript (ES6+), DOM manipulation, async/await, and web fundamentals.

modules.title: Advanced JavaScript & TypeScript
modules.description: TypeScript essentials, advanced patterns, module systems, and build tooling.

modules.title: React Development Bootcamp
modules.description: React components, hooks, state management, routing, and building production-ready SPAs.

modules.title: Advanced React & Next.js
modules.description: Server-side rendering, static generation, advanced hooks patterns, and performance optimization.

modules.title: Node.js & Express Backend
modules.description: Server-side JavaScript with Node.js, RESTful API design, middleware, and authentication.

modules.title: Java Programming Fundamentals
modules.description: Java syntax, OOP principles, collections framework, exception handling, and JVM internals.

modules.title: Spring Boot Microservices
modules.description: Building production microservices with Spring Boot, Spring Data, and Spring Security.

modules.title: Machine Learning Foundations
modules.description: Supervised/unsupervised learning, model evaluation, feature engineering, and practical ML workflows.

modules.title: Advanced ML & Model Optimization
modules.description: Ensemble methods, hyperparameter tuning, model interpretability, and production deployment.

modules.title: Deep Learning with PyTorch
modules.description: Neural network architectures, CNNs, RNNs, training techniques, and PyTorch ecosystem.

modules.title: Natural Language Processing
modules.description: Text processing, embeddings, transformers, sentiment analysis, and NER with hands-on projects.

modules.title: Large Language Models & GenAI
modules.description: Understanding LLMs, prompt engineering, RAG architecture, and building AI-powered applications.

modules.title: LangChain & AI Application Development
modules.description: Building chains, agents, retrieval systems, and production AI pipelines with LangChain.

modules.title: Data Analysis with Python
modules.description: Data manipulation, statistical analysis, and visualization with the Python data stack.

modules.title: SQL & Database Design
modules.description: Relational database concepts, complex queries, indexing, normalization, and performance tuning.

modules.title: Advanced Database Systems
modules.description: Multi-paradigm databases, replication, sharding, caching strategies, and data architecture.

modules.title: AWS Cloud Practitioner
modules.description: Core AWS services, compute, storage, networking, security, and cost optimization fundamentals.

modules.title: AWS Solutions Architecture
modules.description: Designing resilient, high-performing, and cost-efficient architectures on AWS.

modules.title: Docker & Container Fundamentals
modules.description: Container concepts, Dockerfile authoring, multi-stage builds, networking, and Docker Compose.

modules.title: Kubernetes Orchestration
modules.description: Pod management, deployments, services, ingress, Helm charts, and cluster operations.

modules.title: CI/CD Pipeline Engineering
modules.description: Automated testing, build pipelines, deployment strategies, and infrastructure as code.

modules.title: Agile & Scrum Mastery
modules.description: Agile principles, Scrum ceremonies, sprint management, and team collaboration techniques.

modules.title: Application Security Fundamentals
modules.description: OWASP Top 10, secure coding practices, authentication patterns, and vulnerability assessment.

modules.title: Cross-Platform Mobile Development
modules.description: Building native mobile apps with React Native, navigation, state management, and app deployment.

modules.title: Flutter App Development
modules.description: Dart language, Flutter widgets, state management, animations, and platform-specific features.

modules.title: Data Engineering with Apache Spark
modules.description: Distributed data processing, Spark SQL, streaming, and large-scale ETL pipeline design.

modules.title: Event Streaming with Apache Kafka
modules.description: Event-driven architecture, Kafka producers/consumers, Kafka Streams, and exactly-once semantics.

modules.title: Data Visualization & BI Tools
modules.description: Visualization principles, dashboard creation, storytelling with data, and BI tool proficiency.

modules.title: Software Testing & QA
modules.description: Testing strategies, test-driven development, mocking, and automated testing frameworks.

modules.title: Professional Communication & Leadership
modules.description: Effective communication, public speaking, team leadership, and stakeholder management.

modules.title: UX/UI Design Fundamentals
modules.description: User-centered design, wireframing, prototyping with Figma, usability testing, and design systems.

modules.title: Version Control with Git
modules.description: Git workflows, branching strategies, merge conflict resolution, and collaborative development.

modules.title: System Design & Architecture
modules.description: Scalability patterns, distributed systems, caching, load balancing, and architecture trade-offs.

modules.title: Angular Development
modules.description: Angular components, services, routing, forms, RxJS, and enterprise application patterns.

modules.title: Vue.js Development
modules.description: Vue 3 composition API, state management with Pinia, routing, and component-driven development.

modules.title: Django Web Development
modules.description: Django MVT architecture, ORM, REST framework, authentication, and deployment strategies.

modules.title: Infrastructure as Code with Terraform
modules.description: Terraform providers, modules, state management, and multi-cloud infrastructure provisioning.

modules.title: Observability & Monitoring
modules.description: Metrics, logging, tracing, alerting, and building comprehensive observability platforms.

source: Custom course catalog aligned with O*NET occupational skill requirements
